breakpoint_1.description: While fighting alone against a single opponent gain +2 armour against their attacks.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Skill feat.

breakpoint_2.description: You may wield two-handed weapons as one handed weapons without downsides.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Body feat.

breakpoint_3.description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, your melee strikes inflict bleed equal to half their damage done (rounded-up).

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Skill feat or Body feat.

breakpoint_4.description: Midnight unarmed strikes apply stun to the target. While grappling a creature, you can move, your movement is 2.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Skill feat.

breakpoint_5.description: Your unarmed strikes deal bonus damage equal to your body score.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 attribute point in Body.

breakpoint_6.description: Every turn gain an additional reaction that is only usable on “Path of the Guardian” traits.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in either brawn or fortitude.

breakpoint_7.description: When your “Path of the Guardian” traits prevent damage that would be done to an ally you gain +1 grace.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 point in brawn and fortitude.

breakpoint_8.description: You no longer lose armour while enraged (except reckless). You gain the ability to dismiss Rage using one action.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat point in might, brawn, fortitude or spirit.

breakpoint_9.description: When reduced to 0 Health, lose half your Max Health until your next rest and stand back up with Full Health. You perish if your maximum reaches 0.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 attribute point in Body and +1 feat point in spirit.

breakpoint_10.description: When you gain armour during combat, gain the same amount of guard.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in brawn, fortitude or spirit.
Tough but for armour.

breakpoint_12.description: Whenever you would sacrifice health, sacrifice 1 less than required.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: You may sacrifice any feat, to gain +2 feat points in any you did not sacrifice them with this Breakpoint.

breakpoint_13.description: When you lose health or armour from your “Path of the Aether” pact traits gain +1 grace.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: You may sacrifice any Attribute point, to gain +2 Attribute points anywhere you did not sacrifice them with this Breakpoint.

breakpoint_14.description: Your debuffs and curses last 1 additional scene.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_15.description: Upcasting spells costs 1 less mana, with no reduced effectiveness.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 different feat points in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_16.description: When you grant an ally a buff, give them 1 stack of mantra as well.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_17.description: When you heal an ally, giving them guard equal to the amount healed until the end of their turn.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: Whenever you heal an ally, you may inflict the same amount of damage to an enemy within 6 tiles of the ally. The enemy may roll spirit to resist the damage.

breakpoint_18.description: Reduce the mana cost of every 4th spell cast by 1 mana.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_19.description: While multicasting you may choose different spells to be cast alongside the original.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Mind feat

breakpoint_21.description: Choose one element; spells of that element deal +X damage, or cost -1 mana if damage is not applicable.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind trait.

breakpoint_22.description: You may change the element type of 2 spells to a different elemental type, applying any elemental bonuses.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Mind feat.

breakpoint_23.description: You may force a reroll on one skill check a day and choose which outcome to use, ignoring the other.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_24.description: You may acquire a trait from the "Path of Archmage".

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Mind feat.

breakpoint_25.description: You have advantage while taming animals.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Skill or Style feat.

breakpoint_26.description: You may have any number of companions in combat.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Skill or Style feat.
+1 feat point in any Skill or Style feat.

breakpoint_28.description: If your first attack of combat is a melee attack from above or behind, apply stun to that target for 2 scenes.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Skill or Style feat.

breakpoint_29.description: Extend the range of “Silver-tongued Siren” traits by 4 tiles. Your vote counts for two while discussing decisions in a group.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 attribute point in Style.

breakpoint_30.description: Your traps no longer affect allies traveling over the trapped tiles. Traps you deploy gain an additional point of durability (they may activate twice before being disabled).

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in finesse, tinkering or scholarship.

breakpoint_31.description: Your traps are entirely hidden from enemies, you may spend your reaction to try and discern a target's next movement (Narrator's discretion, but if no variables change the target should take the path described by the Narrator).

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different feat between; finesse, tinkering and scholarship.

breakpoint_32.description: Ignore up to 2 stacks of slowed, if you did not, ignore up to 2 tiles of rough terrain this turn.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 movement

breakpoint_33.description: If you have moved before a melee attack, deal bonus damage based on the tiles traveled over 8.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 movement

breakpoint_32.description: Whenever you would naturally gain Grace gain an additional grace. Improvised weapons have +2 accuracy.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Skill feat.

breakpoint_33.description: Whenever you negate a spell you gain mana equal to its casting cost. Whenever you cause a creature to lose mana you regain the same amount of mana.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 Feat point in any Skill or Mind feat.

breakpoint_34.description: Whenever you interact with a creature's spell, trait or attack using traits from “Path of Entropy” that creature cannot repeat it until the end of their next turn.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 Feat points in any different Skill or Mind feat.

breakpoint_35.description: Whenever you are healed for 4 or more health, regain 1 mana.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_36.description: Your spells that have their mana cost reduced cost an additional 1 mana less.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different Mind feat.

breakpoint_37.description: You may use any amount of grace instead of having to use it all in the same instance.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any feat.

breakpoint_38.description: You may use Grace to regain mana, health, gain guard, increase your movement or range for the turn. You may also spend 6 Grace to gain a stack of Haste.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points used in any different feat.

breakpoint_39.description: Your “Path of the Swiftness” traits no longer need a target to dash to. You may instead dash to any tile within range.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Body or Skill feat.

breakpoint_40.description: When you or an ally defeats an enemy, enemies within 4 tiles, allies of the defeated target suffer –2 Accuracy until the end of next scene.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Body or Skill feat.

breakpoint_41.description: When YOU defeat an enemy you gain a stack of Haste.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 different feat points used in Body or Skill.

breakpoint_42.description: While planning a path of travel you may gain knowledge of the dangers or advantages ahead (Narrator's discretion).

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in awareness, any Skill or any Mind feat.

breakpoint_43.description: Allies share the benefits of your Path of the "Worldwalker" traits.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points among awareness, any Skill or any Mind feat.

breakpoint_44.description: You ignore disadvantage on your ranged attacks while in melee range.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in finesse, reflex or awareness.

breakpoint_45.description: You may shoot twice with a single attack action, if you have 2 ranged weapons equipped and loaded.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in finesse. +1 feat point in either reflex or awareness.

breakpoint_46.description: Performing a ranged attack influenced by “Path of the Sharpshooter” grants that attack +2 accuracy.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 finesse on aim checks. +3 range on your ranged weaponry.

breakpoint_47.description: If your accuracy exceeded the target's armour by at least 3, you may select a specific spot on the target to hit.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 finesse on aim checks. +3 range on your ranged weaponry.

breakpoint_48.description: All your ranged weaponry pierces all targets in range dealing base weapon damage to all targets after the first.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 finesse on aim checks. +3 range on your ranged weaponry.

breakpoint_49.description: Your “Path of the Marauder” area of effect attacks use your melee weapon attack damage, if it exceeds the base damage of the trait.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 different feat points in any Body or Skill feat.

breakpoint_50.description: You may use Ethereal Step, Ghost or Voidwalker as a reaction to dodge an incoming attack. Predicting an enemy action with the use of “Path of the Final Frontier” grants you or an ally 3 guard and +3 spirit.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_42.description: Your level 2 spells cost 1 mana. Your level 3 and level 4 spells cost 2 mana.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Mind feat.

breakpoint_43.description: Your spell damage bonus is equal to your arcane.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 Mind attribute points.

breakpoint_44.description: You may unlock an additional trait point that can only be used on traits from the “Path of the Tradesmen”.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any Skill feat or any Mind feat.

breakpoint_45.description: You gain advantage on out of combat checks, whenever applicable to your “Path of the Tradesmen” traits.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 different feat points in any Skill feat or any Mind feat.

breakpoint_46.description: Increase your known crafting Tier by one. Gain 2 additional known crafts.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in tinkering or scholarship.

breakpoint_47.description: Studying / disassembling a craft will let you learn its crafting recipe.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 different feat points in any Skill feat or Mind feat.

breakpoint_48.description: Gain a feat point in any feat, for every 3 different paths you have at least 1 trait unlocked in.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any feat.

breakpoint_50.description: You may share your Grace with allies.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +1 feat point in any feat.

breakpoint_51.description: While allies are within 6 tiles of you they have Courage and Peace.

alternative_feat_bonuses.feat: +2 feat points in any different feat.

traits.Name: Mirror Disciplines
traits.Description: You gain either +2 Armor or +2 Accuracy until your next turn.

traits.Name: Riposte
traits.Description: If you took Guard damage without your Guard being fully depleted, make a free attack against the creature that hit you.

traits.Name: Strike The Hand
traits.Description: You make an attack with your melee weapon, attempting to disarm an enemy. They must roll [Fortitude] vs [6 + your Might or your Finesse] to resist.

traits.Name: Precision Form
traits.Description: If your attack accuracy exceeded half (rounded up) of the enemy's armor, that attack gains +X damage.

traits.Name: Duelist Technique
traits.Description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, gain +X Armor and +X Reflex.

traits.Name: Duelist’s Prowess
traits.Description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, your critical success (Midnight) range expands down to 10. Non-midnight rolls do not consume charges.

traits.Name: Parry
traits.Description: When hit by a melee attack, contest the roll with a Reflex check. On success, ignore the damage. If you are at least level 6 you may parry ranged attacks as well.

traits.Name: Perfect Form
traits.Description: When wielding a single one-handed weapon, gain +2 Accuracy and +1 Damage. If you hit without being hit in the same scene, regain 1 Health.

traits.Name: Counter Stance
traits.Description: When a Taunted creature strikes you, they take X Damage. The Damage type matches your weapons type.

traits.Name: Twin Strikes
traits.Description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, ignore attack per turn restrictions attacking with that weapon.

traits.Name: Momentum Drive
traits.Description: Consecutive hits against the same target grant you +1 Damage, stacking up to a maximum of +4 damage, missing or switching targets resets the stack.

traits.Name: Slam Dunk
traits.Description: If you jump over an obstacle or climb a wall you can jump at an enemy and attack with your weapon; doing +X Damage. An ally can also offer a boost, as a reaction, to perform this attack.

traits.Name: Hostage Taker
traits.Description: While grappling a creature, attacks no longer have Advantage against you.

traits.Name: Crushing Blow
traits.Description: You make a melee attack that deals +X Damage and you suffer -Y Movement this turn.

traits.Name: Braced Stance
traits.Description: You count as one size larger for grappling checks.

traits.Name: Bodyslam
traits.Description: You slam your body against a target within melee range. Deal damage to the target equal to your guard, lose all guard after this attack.

traits.Name: Toss Me
traits.Description: You can throw a grappled creature at least 1 size smaller than you. They are treated as a thrown weapon you are proficient with and do not provoke attacks of opportunity. The range of the throw is [3+ Your Might Total] tiles. If the creature hits another Target, they deal damage equal to [your Might total] to eachother. If the thrown creature is an ally, they do not take damage from this trait and may make an attack immediately upon landing.

traits.Name: Leg Sweep
traits.Description: Perform a non-Damaging unarmed attack; If the attack hits the target is knocked prone.

traits.Name: Compelling Invite
traits.Description: All adjacent enemies become Taunted.

traits.Name: Gumption
traits.Description: While unarmored, gain +X Armor.

traits.Name: Patient
traits.Description: You start combat with 1 mantra stack, your mantra stacks cannot drop below 1. All healing you receive is given to you as stacks of mantra instead.

traits.Name: Swift Hug
traits.Description: When you dash into a target you may attempt to grapple them as a free action.

traits.Name: Safety Net
traits.Description: When your chosen Ally/Companion would fall to 0 Health, they intead remain at 1 Health and gain +2 Armor until the end of their next turn.

traits.Name: Back To Back We Stand
traits.Description:
Choose an Ally or Companion, (this choice can only be changed upon leveling up or if the bondead target dies)

while they are within an adjecient tile of you, you both gain +1 Accuracy and +1 Armor. You have +2 Movement while moving towards them.

traits.Name: Brother’s Bond
traits.Description:
Choose an Ally or Companion, (this choice can only be changed upon leveling up or if the bondead target dies)

When you give yourself a buff, you may share the same effect with your chosen ally.

traits.Name: Surprise Friend
traits.Description:
Choose an Ally or Companion, (this choice can only be changed upon leveling up or if the bondead target dies)

On your turn, you and your chosen ally may teleport to switch positions with each other using a reaction.

traits.Name: Meat Shield
traits.Description: When Obstructing aim, you count as half cover.

traits.Name: Stasis Shield
traits.Description: When an adjacent ally is attacked, take X damage to reduce that attack's damage by X.

traits.Name: Guardian’s Oath
traits.Description: When an adjacent ally is attacked, take X damage to reduce that attack's damage by X.

traits.Name: One For All
traits.Description: Any guard you gain is evenly divided among you and your allies.

traits.Name: Sojourners
traits.Description: When you receive a Buff from an ally you can apply a copy of the Buff to another ally.

traits.Name: Guardian’s Call
traits.Description: Heal all allies within 2 tiles for your [Level] health, If any of them had guard increase the healing they receive by 2.

traits.Name: Swift and Vigilant
traits.Description: If you dash into an ally, they gain Guard equal to your [Level]; otherwise, you gain Guard equal to your level.

traits.Name: Berserk
traits.Description: You gain the ability to enter a Rage state on your turn (During this condition you lose 6 Armor and gain +1 Damage and +2 Accuracy. This condition is dismissed if you haven't attacked or taken damage for 2 scenes). While in Rage you have an additional +X Damage and +X Accuracy.

traits.Name: Enduring Rage
traits.Description: When you enter Rage, gain Guard equal to your Level + 2. Your Rage lasts an additional scene.

traits.Name: Bloodlust
traits.Description: While in Rage; You ignore Attack per turn restrictions, however you cannot take any actions that would not deal damage.

traits.Name: Reckless
traits.Description: While in Rage; Your Armor becomes 0, All Melee Damage you deal is doubled.

traits.Name: Natural Defenses
traits.Description: While in Rage, you gain Resistances to Blunt, Slash, and Pierce Damage.

traits.Name: Unstoppable Force
traits.Description: While raging you ignore all negative conditions and effects imposed upon you. Your Rage ends immediately at the end of a turn in which you did not attack.

traits.Name: Poke The Nest
traits.Description: If you have taken at least 3 separate instances of damage during one combat, enter Rage automatically.

traits.Name: Enduring Spirit
traits.Description: When at or below half Health, gain +X Armor and +X Spirit.

traits.Name: Unyielding Defense
traits.Description: The first time you drop to or below half health, gain Guard equal to your [Level] +X

traits.Name: Last Stand
traits.Description: While at or below half Health, gain +2 Damage, +1 Armor and +1 Spirit.

traits.Name: Death Disregard
traits.Description: While in Rage, dropping to 0 health will no longer render you unconscious, instead you remain functional. While at 0 health Final Death Blows still take effect, when you run out of Final Death Resistances you instantly die. Receiving healing greater than 3 will reset one of the Final Blow Resistances.

traits.Name: Martyr’s Zeal
traits.Description: Whenever you take health damage, gain +1 Damage on your next attack. This stacks up to 3 times and resets after you attack.

traits.Name: Enticipation
traits.Description: This action consumes your attack action this turn, gain X Guard until your next attack.

traits.Name: Thick Skin
traits.Description: After combat, recover half of your missing health.

traits.Name: Unshakable
traits.Description: You gain [6 + Your Level + Your Fortitude] Guard, you cannot Move, Be Moved or Attack while this guard is active (Unshakable can be removed with any debuff removal effects).

traits.Name: Survival Skills
traits.Description: At the start of each Scene you gain Guard equal to the number of times you were attacked last Scene.

traits.Name: Adaptive Hide
traits.Description: If an enemy attacks you twice in one combat, gain +X Armor against that enemy for the rest of combat

traits.Name: Stress Recovery
traits.Description: At the start of your turn, if you have guard, recover X Health.

traits.Name: Steadfast
traits.Description: You permanently have 1 Guard (Overguard damage, damages you as normal).

traits.Name: Unstoppable Mass
traits.Description: Gain +2 Armor and you cannot be knocked prone, restrained, grappled or forcibly moved when at or below half Health.

traits.Name: Combat Guard
traits.Description: Taunting enemies grants 1 Guard per enemy taunted. Guard gain is doubled for enemies larger than you.

traits.Name: Crimson Convergence
traits.Description: Healing beyond your max health is converted into Guard, up to a maximum of 2 + (X times your level, roundead up).

traits.Name: Swift and Impactful
traits.Description: The target you dash to becomes Stunned if you have a shield equipped.

traits.Name: Transfusion
traits.Description: Deal 3 Damage to yourself, heal a creature other than yourself 6 health.

traits.Name: Veiled Blessing
traits.Description: You can no longer be Healed or gain Guard from allies. You have +X Armor.

traits.Name: Arena’s Crowd Pleaser
traits.Description: For the next 2 Scenes you lose 4 Armor and gain +4 Accuracy.

traits.Name: Bookies Choice
traits.Description: Lose access to cantrips, gaining Maximum Mana equal to the number of cantrips lost. Future cantrips are also converted.

traits.Name: Blood Pact
traits.Description: Spend any amount of health to deal half that amount (rounded up) as bonus Damage.

traits.Name: Display Of Dominance
traits.Description: Deal 4 Damage to yourself; The next 3 enemy attacks in a 2 tile radius have their damage reduced by 2.

traits.Name: Forgotten Dementia
traits.Description: When a spell is cast within 8 tiles, you may counter it; doing so causes you to lose access to a spell you know of your choice until your next rest.

traits.Name: Share In Anguish
traits.Description: You lose 4 armor until the end of combat, 3 enemies within 8 tiles suffer -3 Accuracy until the end of combat.

traits.Name: Scarlet Essence
traits.Description: All your mana costs are reduced by 1. You lose 2 Health, each time you cast a spell.

traits.Name: Boiling Blood
traits.Description: Spells cost no mana, instead pay [Double the Spell level] as Health. "Scarlet Essence" no longer has any effect.

traits.Name: Sanguine Casting
traits.Description: Spend up to your level health to add that much Damage or Healing to your next spell. If the spell kills an enemy, regain half the Health spent.

traits.Name: Mystic Sacrifice
traits.Description: Deal 4 Damage to yourself to receive 2 Mana.

traits.Name: Occult Apprentice
traits.Description: Gain access to Occult Spellcasting. You learn a number of Occult spells equal to your [Scholarship], you cannot learn spells above level 2; Spells are always upcast. You learn 2 Occult cantrips.

traits.Name: Secrets Of The Cosmos
traits.Description: Occult cantrips and Cosmic spells gain +1 Range. Learn 1 Occult cantrip and 1 Cosmic spell, bypassing type restrictions.

traits.Name: Cursed Cycle
traits.Description: When one of your controlled or cursed/debuffed targets is defeated, move the curse to a new target and refresh its duration.

traits.Name: Occult Dominion
traits.Description: Occult Curses/Debuffs gain an additional Target.

traits.Name: Eldritch Convergence
traits.Description: When you attack a target affected by yours or an allie’s Debuff, that attack deals +X Dark Damage.

traits.Name: Hexweaver
traits.Description: You impose a curse on a creature, they must roll [Spirit] resisting [6+ Your Arcane]. On a failure they suffer -2 Accuracy and -1 Damage for 2 Scenes.

traits.Name: Forbidden Insight
traits.Description: Learn one passive effect of a creature within 6 tiles. Your next attack or spell against it deals +2 Damage.

traits.Name: Forbidden Insight
traits.Description: Learn one passive effect of a creature within 6 tiles. Your next attack or spell against it deals +2 Damage.

traits.Name: Divine Initiate
traits.Description: Gain access to Divine Spellcasting. You learn a number of Divine spells equal to your [Scholarship]. You learn 2 Divine cantrips.

traits.Name: Guiding Faith
traits.Description: Your melee spell infused attacks have +X Accuracy.

traits.Name: Strand Of Restoration
traits.Description: When you cast a healing or buff spell, you or one ally regain 2 health.

traits.Name: Chain Of Restoration
traits.Description: When you cast a healing spell or buff spell, extend its effect to one ally or you at full strength. "Strand Of Restoration" no longer has any effect.

traits.Name: Candle Keeper
traits.Description: Light sources you hold never go out (Narrator's Discretion). While in its light, gain +1 Awareness and +1 Reflex.

traits.Name: Rejuvenating Pulse
traits.Description: Heal all allies within 3 tiles for X Health.

traits.Name: Radiance Of The Lightbearer
traits.Description: When you heal an ally within 2 tiles they gain 2 points of Mantra.

traits.Name: Morning Light
traits.Description: Treat the next turn of a chosen ally, or yourself, as if it were the first action they/you have taken this combat.

traits.Name: Smite the Forsaken
traits.Description: Perform a melee attack with your weapon, you may spend a number of mana equal to your level, add the amount of mana spent as damage to this attack.

traits.Name: Answered Prayer
traits.Description: During your rest you may perform a 30 minute ritual; doing so grants you X Grace after the Rest concludes.

traits.Name: Cosmic Novice
traits.Description: Gain access to Cosmic Spellcasting. You learn a number of Cosmic spells equal to your [Scholarship], you cannot learn spells above level 1. Upcasting a spell instead casts it multiple times instead.

traits.Name: Cosmic Protection
traits.Description: Each cast of a Cosmic spell grants +1 Guard.

traits.Name: Knowledge Seeker
traits.Description: Each night, you may ask the universe one yes/no question(Narrator's discretion).

traits.Name: Disperse Impulse
traits.Description: While multicasting if at least 3 of your spells are assigned different targets from each other, double their effectiveness.

traits.Name: Overwhelming assault
traits.Description: If you targeted an enemy 4 times in one turn, apply stun to that target. They must roll fortitude to resist.

traits.Name: Yielding Defence
traits.Description: Your spells apply Compromised to enemies you targeted with them, until the end of your turn.

traits.Name: Elemental Disciple
traits.Description: Gain access to Elemental Spellcasting. You learn a number of Elemental spells equal to your [Scholarship]. You learn 2 Elemental cantrips.

traits.Name: Elemental Coating
traits.Description: During a rest, modify six shots of ammunition to deal +X Elemental Damage of a chosen type.

traits.Name: Elemental Draw
traits.Description: You make an unarmed attack or an attack using your weapon, the attack deals +X elemental damage of a chosen type and is considered magical.

traits.Name: Home Turf
traits.Description: Enemy attacks and effects targeting you, matching your chosen element suffer a -X Accuracy penalty.

traits.Name: Stormbringer
traits.Description: Cast a lightning spell as if it were one level higher. Lightning spells deal 1 Damage to targets within 2 units of the target.

traits.Name: Ember Soul
traits.Description: Fire spells deal +X Damage and apply Burn. You gain resistance to the Burn Condition.

traits.Name: Frostwalker
traits.Description: Ice spells apply Chilled to creatures and grant you +X Armor for 1 turn per cast.

traits.Name: Stone Skin
traits.Description: Casting earth spells, or using earth elemental effects, grants you 2 Guard (stacking), until the end of your next turn.

traits.Name: Natures Lash
traits.Description: Hitting a creature with a Nature infused attack heals the closest ally by X.

traits.Name: Wave Flow
traits.Description: Casting water spells grants you bonus speed this turn based on the mana cost of the spell casted.

traits.Name: Living Tempest
traits.Description: If you hit a creature with a Wind infused attack, you may push the target backwards X tiles.

traits.Name: Potent Toxin
traits.Description: Poison infused attacks, apply +1 poison to the affected target. When a point of poison would expire it gets reapplied to the same target.

traits.Name: Arcane Student
traits.Description: Gain access to Arcane Spellcasting. You learn a number of Arcane spells equal to your [Scholarship]. You learn 2 Arcane cantrips.

traits.Name: Arcane Sniper
traits.Description: Arcane spells gain +4 Range.

traits.Name: Spell Echo
traits.Description: Repeat the last spell cast within 8 tiles. Ignore any of its costs.

traits.Name: Thought Out Plan
traits.Description: Use this trait only if you have not acted this turn, you may skip it. Next turn you have 3 Actions.

traits.Name: Temporal Surge
traits.Description: Take an additional action this turn. Gain 1 Fatigue at the end of combat.

traits.Name: Cantrip Adept
traits.Description: You learn 2 additional cantrips from your chosen spellcasting type. If you have chosen cosmic, learn one extra spell instead.

traits.Name: Cantrip Adept
traits.Description: You learn 2 additional cantrips from your chosen spellcasting type. If you have chosen cosmic, learn one extra spell instead.

traits.Name: Spell Interface
traits.Description: Once per rest, imbue a spell you know into a machine or construct, the spell lasts for a day, and will trigger based on a condition you declared at imbuement. (Complexity determines spell level, Trivial = Cantrips, Simple =1 mana etc.)

traits.Name: Magus Veil
traits.Description: Casting a spell grants you Guard equal to half your level rounded up. This refreshes but does not stack.

traits.Name: Price Of Mending
traits.Description: You can repair Durability of Crafts or Craft Companions using ,mana or health; Each point of Durability is equal to 4 mana or 2 health.

traits.Name: Minmaximize
traits.Description: Any Damage, Healing, or Guard gain with a base value lower than X is increased to X.

traits.Name: Beast Whisperer
traits.Description: Tamed animals can be used as companions in combat.

traits.Name: Bonded Instinct
traits.Description: When you command your companion to strike the same target as you, your companion gains +X Accuracy against that target.

traits.Name: Spirit Bond
traits.Description: When your companion is healed, you recover half the Health restored to your companion. You can sense through your companion within 12 tiles.

traits.Name: Noble Steed
traits.Description: While riding your companion, gain +2 Armor. Each combat; for the first time you or your mount would take damage, you both gain Guard equal to mount's Movement before damage is applied. Guard gained this way is shared between you and your mount.

traits.Name: Companion Recall
traits.Description: If your companion is within 10 tiles. You may teleport them to a tile adjacent to you and instantly heal them by half Your Level rounded up.

traits.Name: Workers Companion
traits.Description: Companions each grant +1 Tinker when brewing, crafting, smithing, medicine, cooking or ritual casting.

traits.Name: Assisted Strike
traits.Description: Your companion may make a free attack against a target you attacked.

traits.Name: Spirit Conduit
traits.Description: You may cast spells from your companion's position.

traits.Name: Arcane Link
traits.Description: Your companion gains a mana pool of 4. You may spend its mana while it is within 6 tiles of you.

traits.Name: Alpha Bond
traits.Description: Your companions attacks deal +1 Damage and gain +2 Accuracy while within 3 tiles of you.

traits.Name: Locksmith
traits.Description: Open non-magical locks with advantage.

traits.Name: Makeup Maid
traits.Description: Outside of combat, you may disguise yourself or allies. Creatures attempting to see through the disguise must roll [Insight] vs [6 + your Speech] to resist.

traits.Name: Treasure Hunter
traits.Description: Gain Advantige for looting (Finesse). While exploring new areas you have +X Movement.

traits.Name: Unseen Strike
traits.Description: The first melee attack each combat is an automatic hit, if performed from behind or above (no Midnights).

traits.Name: Dummies
traits.Description: You may spend this reaction at any point. You dash to an unoccupied space within 3 tiles, you leave a “Target Dummy” with 3 Durability on the tile you dashed from. Any attacks targeting you are redirected to the dummy.

traits.Name: Risky Strike
traits.Description: Invest any amount of Gold into performing an attack dealing X damage, if the creature being targeted dies you gain a proportionate amount of bonus of Gold. If you miss or the creature survives, you lose the gold invested(Narrator's discretion).

traits.Name: Quiet Steps
traits.Description: While hidden, your first attack deals +2 Damage. While in darkness or dim light, you are considered hidden.

traits.Name: Pocket Aces
traits.Description: You have Advantage on all gambling and luck related checks.

traits.Name: Master Of Disguise
traits.Description: Gain +2 Speech and +1 Finesse while disguised or attempting to blend into a crowd.

traits.Name: Hit and Fade
traits.Description: After making an attack, you may dash 2 tiles, if you change elevation or cover, gain +1 Accuracy on your next attack.

traits.Name: Perfectionist Strike
traits.Description: On a hit, you deal bonus Damage to the target equal to half the amount your attack exceeded the target's Armor. On a miss, take Damage equal to half the amount you missed by.

traits.Name: Swift and Crippling
traits.Description: If the target you dashed into is an enemy, they gain 3 stacks of Slow until the start of your next turn.

traits.Name: Storyteller
traits.Description: Tell a tale; allies gain 2 Grace at the end of the rest. You have +1 Scholarship.

traits.Name: Street Performer
traits.Description: Performing in public outside of combat earns rewards worth at least 3 gold (Narrator's Discretion) and does not consume uses. Performing in combat grants allies within 5 tiles +2 Accuracy.

traits.Name: Drama Queen
traits.Description: You attempt to convince creatures targeting you that you are dead. You are knocked prone; affected creatures must roll [Insight] vs your [Speech] roll to resist; Creatures you have already tricked will gain +2 to the roll.

traits.Name: Wingman
traits.Description: Your chosen ally/companion gains Advantage on Speech checks.

traits.Name: Musician
traits.Description: You can play a chosen instrument and are proficient with it as an improvised weapon using your highest weapon proficiency, if it is used as a thrown or ranged weapon, it has 6 units of range. While playing, allies within hearing range gain either [your Speech - 1] Armor or [your Speech] Accuracy.

traits.Name: Lead Role
traits.Description: Gain +1 Speech; When you spend grace on an attack roll it deals bonus Damage equal to your [Speech].

traits.Name: Fearsome Sight
traits.Description: Gain advantage on Intimidation (Speech) checks. If your roll exceeded the enemies resisting roll by 6 or more, impose the Feared Condition to the target.

traits.Name: Commanding Presence
traits.Description: You command a creature within 6 tiles to lay down its arms, it will not act for 2 scenes, or until damaged. It must roll [Insight] vs your [Speech] roll to resist.

traits.Name: Master Manipulator
traits.Description: Attempt to charm one intelligent creature for 3 turns, they must roll [Insight] vs your [Speech] to resist. Outside combat, you have advantage on negotiations and deals.

traits.Name: Intimidating Roar
traits.Description: Attempt to Stun enemies within 7 tiles, they must roll [Spirit] vs your [Speech] to resist. Regain a use of this trait when you or an ally defeat an enemy.

traits.Name: Combat Wingman
traits.Description: Allies have advantage against enemies Taunted by you.

traits.Name: Brutal Ridicule
traits.Description: Creatures you taunted become enter Rage

traits.Name: Combat Trapper
traits.Description:
Using [1× Common Component] you can create a trap with one durability in an adjacent unoccupied tile. When the trap activates, decrease its durability by 1. If a target would step on the same tile as the trap it activates, dealing X Blunt damage and applying 3 stacks of Slow to the target.

Using [1× Rope Component] you can create and throw a Bola (finesse) you are proficient with. Bolas can be thrown up to 6 tiles away doing X blunt damage and applying 3 stacks of Slow to the creature.

traits.Name: Conductive Wiring
traits.Description: Using [1× Metal - Wire], you can create fences up to 4 Tiles long and 1 Unit tall. Each fence dealing X Lightning Damage and applying Stun when a creature crosses it, losing 1 durability. The fence has 1 Durability.

traits.Name: Remote activation
traits.Description: Activate an allied mechanical device, trap, or gadget within 6 tiles as a free action.

traits.Name: Remote activation
traits.Description: Activate an allied mechanical device, trap, or gadget within 6 tiles as a free action.

traits.Name: Deployment Trapper
traits.Description: Traps you can deploy can be deployed within a range of 5 tiles.

traits.Name: Constructive Trapper
traits.Description: [2× Common Component]: Create a trapped 2x2 area, it can trap multiple creatures, it will only trigger when a declared condition is met, the condition is set upon deployment. Trapped creatures take X damage and acquire 3 stacks of Slow until the end of their next turn.

traits.Name: Guerrilla Trapper
traits.Description:
You can deploy 2 normal traps, or 1 Large trap during a rest using no resorces.
Normal traps: Combat Trapper traps.
Large traps: Constructive Trapper traps

traits.Name: Explosive Trapper
traits.Description: Traps you deploy may, when triggered, deal +1 Damage and extend the damage zone to all adjacent tiles. These traps require at least 1 additional relevant component to create.

traits.Name: Binding Trapper
traits.Description: Traps you deploy now knock enemies prone or blind them, stated at the time of deployment, they must roll [Reflex] vs [6 + Tinker] to resist being blinded or knocked prone, but cannot resist being damaged or slowed.

traits.Name: Traveler's Endurance
traits.Description: You have +1 Movement and you ignore the first level of Fatigue.

traits.Name: Coward’s Instinct
traits.Description: Gain +2 Movement while moving away from enemies or while you have the feared condition.

traits.Name: Leg day
traits.Description: Double your Movement until next turn; your Movement is halved the following turn.

traits.Name: Climber
traits.Description: You gain advantage on climbing checks. While not moving and on a wall, you cannot be knocked off it.

traits.Name: Light Footed
traits.Description: If you have traveled at least 8 tiles within 1 action; You gain +3 Reflex and +3 Armor for 2 Scenes including the current one.

traits.Name: Treaded Ground
traits.Description: While traveling on tiles an Ally has already traveled on this Scene, you gain +3 Movement.

traits.Name: Evasive Stance
traits.Description: You gain bonus Armor equal to the amount of Movement over 5.

traits.Name: Eternal Discipline
traits.Description: Two trait uses restore automatically after each combat.

traits.Name: Drift Distance
traits.Description: All your dashes have bonus tiles of movement equal to half your speed over 5 (rounded up).

traits.Name: Drift Distance
traits.Description: All your dashes have bonus tiles of movement equal to half your speed over 5 (rounded up).

traits.Name: Tavern Brawler
traits.Description: Improvised weaponry uses X as its accuracy bonus and deals +1 Damage.

traits.Name: Bardic Drunk
traits.Description: While you have the intoxicated condition, you have +X damage.

traits.Name: Pocket Sand
traits.Description: Blind a creature entering your melee range until their next turn.

traits.Name: Combat Carpenter
traits.Description: You can create an improvised melee or throwing weapon from any number of wooden components as an action. You are proficient with the weapon you created. It has 1 Durability and deals Blunt damage equaling the number of components used. If it is a thrown weapon it has a range of 5.

traits.Name: Poke The Eye
traits.Description: Hitting an enemy causes their attacks to suffer -X Accuracy until your next turn.

traits.Name: Vanishing Act
traits.Description: When you take damage you may immediately perform an attack with halved Damage (Rounded up) against the target you took damage from and you may dash up to 2 tiles.

traits.Name: Forceful Sharing
traits.Description: When a creature within 8 tiles is healed by anyone but themselves, you may reduce the healing done by your [Level] and heal yourself for the amount reduced.

traits.Name: Convenience Fee
traits.Description: Drain 3 mana from an ally within 6 tiles, add it to yourself.

traits.Name: All For One
traits.Description: Half of any guard gained by your allies (rounded down) is instead given to you instead.

traits.Name: Personal Vendetta
traits.Description: You Taunt a target up to 6 tiles away. If your weapon range exceeds 6, use your weapon range instead.

traits.Name: Swiftswitch
traits.Description: The target you dash into is swapped with your original position.

traits.Name: Spellbreaker
traits.Description: When a spell is cast within 6 tiles, you may negate it. You can only do this before rolls are made.

traits.Name: Fair Fight
traits.Description: You create a 3×3 zone you must occupy on cast. Spells cannot be cast within it, and spells from outside cannot target creatures inside the zone. The zone lasts 3 Scenes, but ends immediately if you leave the zone.

traits.Name: Reluctance
traits.Description: Remove all weapon proficiencies of a target within 8 tiles until your next turn.

traits.Name: Fair Strike
traits.Description: The chosen target's next attack loses all modifiers and deals only base weapon damage.

traits.Name: Disagreeable Aegis
traits.Description: When you are struck by a ranged attack and you have Guard or a shield; Redirect the projectile towards the creature that attacked you, treat it as a ranged attack originating from you.

traits.Name: Glinting Armour
traits.Description: Upon getting hit by an attack, you may reflect half of that damage back at the source.

traits.Name: Red Zone Punishment
traits.Description: When you negate a spell, cause an explosion on the tile and all adjacent tiles from where the spell originated, dealing damage equal to the spells damage or mana cost.

traits.Name: Resolute Will
traits.Description: Ignore the first negative condition each rest, as long as it is not instantly reapplied.

traits.Name: Resolute Will
traits.Description: Ignore the first negative condition each rest, as long as it is not instantly reapplied.

traits.Name: Resolute Will
traits.Description: Ignore the first negative condition each rest, as long as it is not instantly reapplied.

traits.Name: Mark Of Death
traits.Description: Transfer any and all negative conditions from yourself to a target within 9 tiles. You don't need to see the target, just know of its presence.

traits.Name: Mark Of Death
traits.Description: Transfer any and all negative conditions from yourself to a target within 9 tiles. You don't need to see the target, just know of its presence.

traits.Name: Mutable Form
traits.Description: Negative condition effects, affecting you become reversed for 1 Scene.

traits.Name: Overflow
traits.Description: While at full Mana, your cantrips deal +X Damage.

traits.Name: All Warmed Up
traits.Description: After you have spent all of your mana for the first time in combat, your non-cantrip spells gain +2 Damage.

traits.Name: Measured Restraint
traits.Description: You lose access to a spell of your choice until your next sleep. You replenish Double its Mana cost as Mana.

traits.Name: Syphoning Whirlpool
traits.Description: You deal 1 force damage to all adjacent enemies; you regain mana equal to the damage dealt.

traits.Name: Battle Ready
traits.Description: During the first Scene of combat, all of your spells cost 2 less mana.

traits.Name: Returned Investment
traits.Description: For every turn you do not cast a spell, you reduce the cost of the next spell cast by 1.

traits.Name: Artillery Mage
traits.Description: Your spells no longer cost mana; but they cost 2 actions to cast.

traits.Name: Restorative Meditation
traits.Description: During rest recover X additional mana.

traits.Name: Absorb Soul
traits.Description: Defeating an enemy with a spell refunds its mana cost.

traits.Name: Memorium
traits.Description: Your grace no longer expires.

traits.Name: High Road
traits.Description: Gain 3+ your [Spirit] Grace at the start of combat, if you had spared a life last combat.

traits.Name: Child Of Fortune
traits.Description: You start combat with Grace equal to half your level (rounded down).

traits.Name: Inspirational
traits.Description: You can no longer generate Grace, nor can you use it as you normally would; You may use 1 Grace point to grant yourself or an ally Advantage.

traits.Name: Spontaneous Insight
traits.Description: Reroll a singular die on any skill check. You gain only 1 Grace regardless of outcome if the skillcheck was performed by you.

traits.Name: Loaded Dice
traits.Description: Instead of grace increasing accuracy, you may spend grace to add a number of dice equal to the grace spent on a skill check. Ignore all but the number of dice equal to the number of dice rolled before using this trait (prioritizing highest dice rolled).

traits.Name: Behold The Infinite
traits.Description: Gain an additional 6 non-cantrip spells from your Spellcasting School; These spells can only be cast by paying for them using Grace instead of mana.

traits.Name: Gravedigger
traits.Description: During a rest, burying a dead ally grants Grace equal to remaining allies, next combat. burying an enemy restores Health to all allies equal to the number of your allies multiplied by your level.

traits.Name: Pathmaker
traits.Description: Dash into a target within 4 tiles, to deal 1 blunt damage if it is an enemy.

traits.Name: Swift and Crushing
traits.Description: The target you dash into takes +1 damage. If they are below half Health, they instead take +2 damage.

traits.Name: Swift and Displacing
traits.Description: The target you dash into is pushed 3 tiles away in the mirrored direction of the dash.

traits.Name: Soul Slash
traits.Description: You may pass through targets while dashing. Enemies you pass through while dashing take 2 Dark Damage. You heal for the total Damage dealt using this trait.

traits.Name: Relentless Advance
traits.Description: Moving into melee range of an enemy grants you +X Accuracy for your next attack. This accuracy increase does not increase from entering the melee range of the same enemy.

traits.Name: Blood Vigor
traits.Description: When you or an ally defeat an enemy, you recover X Health.

traits.Name: Adrenalin Rush
traits.Description: Whenever you or an ally defeats an enemy, ignore a point of fatigue until the end of combat. If you have no fatigue, regain a use of one of your traits.

traits.Name: Ruthless Predator
traits.Description: Your attacks of opportunity deal +2 damage.

traits.Name: Executioner’s Edge
traits.Description: You deal +2 damage to enemies at half Health or lower.

traits.Name: Guillotine
traits.Description: You deal +3 damage to prone enemies.

traits.Name: No Restrains
traits.Description: Deal double damage to Guard.

traits.Name: Thrill Of The Hunt
traits.Description: When you damage an enemy, gain +1 Movement this turn. If an enemy is defeated, gain +1 Damage on your next attack.

traits.Name: Hermit
traits.Description: Recover additional Health when resting alone equal to your level. While no allies are within 3 tiles, gain +X Accuracy or +Y Armor.

traits.Name: Fisher
traits.Description: When resting near a body of water, regain half your max health in addition to any other healing. You can fish while resting, guaranteeing treasure worth a small amount of gold (Narrator's discretion).

traits.Name: Survivalist
traits.Description: Gain +X Accuracy against beasts and natural creatures. Gain +X on Awareness, Reflex, and Fortitude checks against natural environments.

traits.Name: Field Medic
traits.Description: Allies resting with you receive double healing from the rest, you can remove 1 Condition per ally once per combat.

traits.Name: Cartographer
traits.Description: Gain advantage on [Scholarship] checks when recalling known locations. When resting in a previously visited area, you cannot be ambushed.

traits.Name: Make It Rain
traits.Description: Using a ranged weapon, you fire a number of shots into the sky equal to your finesse, these will land and hit random targets within 8 tiles dealing 1 damage per shot.

traits.Name: Live-fire Tempo
traits.Description: The first time you reload a ranged weapon each turn, it costs no action.

traits.Name: Explosive Ammunition
traits.Description: Make a Ranged attack that explodes to all adjecent tiles of the target tile, the explosion deals the attack's damage +X to all targets in the area.

traits.Name: Bounding Retreat
traits.Description: After you make a ranged attack, you may dash up to 3 tiles.

traits.Name: Suppressive Fire
traits.Description: Unleash a 4 tile cone of projectiles with your ranged weapon. Creatures within it must seek the nearest cover as a reaction, if they do can not or do not find any, they take 2 Damage.

traits.Name: Hard Target
traits.Description: Cover grants one higher tier of protection. While in cover, gain +2 Accuracy. On your turn you may move between covers that are at maximum 4 tiles apart using your reaction.

traits.Name: Quickdraw
traits.Description: You may make an attack with your ranged weapon as the first action of combat, your position in the initiative remains the same position.

traits.Name: Tracer Flare
traits.Description: Fire a glowing projectile using your ranged weapon, it marks the struck target; allies gain +X accuracy against the marked target.

traits.Name: Arc Shot
traits.Description: While targeting creatures behind partial cover, you have +2 accuracy.

traits.Name: Non-lethal Shot
traits.Description: You can choose to deal non-lethal damage with your ranged attacks. Thoes attacks still consume an attack action.

traits.Name: Crippling Shot
traits.Description: Make a ranged attack that applies 3 Stacks of Slow to the target for X turns.

traits.Name: Snipers Nest
traits.Description: While Prone you have Advantage on non-spell ranged attacks.

traits.Name: Steady Hand
traits.Description: For each Scene you did not take damage, you gain +1 Accuracy, stacking infinitely, but resets when you get hit.

traits.Name: Take A Breath
traits.Description: The next ranged attack you perform gains +X Accuracy and +Y Damage.

traits.Name: Piercing Shot
traits.Description: Fire through up to two targets in a line. The first target takes +2 Damage. You only need to hit the first target.

traits.Name: Camper’s Discipline
traits.Description: If you did not move this and last Scene, your next ranged attack gains +X Damage and +Y Accuracy.

traits.Name: Dead Horizon
traits.Description: Make one ranged attack with +X Damage, piercing all enemies in line within range. If any enemy dies to this, regain the trait use. Targets must roll [Reflex] vs you accuracy roll.

traits.Name: Longshot
traits.Description: Your ranged weapons and traits, have +X range.

traits.Name: Blade Spin
traits.Description: Deal half Your Level (rounded up) damage to all adjacent tiles. Taunted enemies take damage an additional time. Creatures must roll [Reflex] vs [8 + your Weapon accuracy bonus] to resist the damage. The damage type matches your weapon.

traits.Name: Pirouette
traits.Description: Deal 1 Damage to all adjacent creatures if this is your first attack in combat, it deals damage twice. Creatures must roll [Reflex] vs [6 + your weapon accuracy bonus] to resist. The damage type matches your weapon.

traits.Name: Sizable Swing
traits.Description: You perform a large swing with your melee weapon, it deals 1 Damage in a 2 Tile Cone. Creatures in the area must roll [Reflex] vs your accuracy roll to resist. The damage type matches your weapon.

traits.Name: Not So Great Weapon Mastery
traits.Description: Weapons that require at least 3 might to weald, deal +X Damage, but suffer -3 Accuracy

traits.Name: Giant Slayer
traits.Description: While targeting a creature that's at least 1 size larger than you, you gain +1 Damage and +1 accuracy.

traits.Name: Against The Odds
traits.Description: If enemies outnumber allies within a 5 tile radius, you gain Armor equal to the difference between enemies and allies. Enemies at least 1 sizes larger than you count as two.

traits.Name: Shumpo
traits.Description: In combat, rolling a Midnight no longer doubles damage; instead, you gain one stack of Haste, which may be used to attack.

traits.Name: Darkness Rise
traits.Description: After landing 3 Attacks in the same combat, you begin to emit a Zone of Death extending to all adjacent tiles. The Zone of Death is treated as rough terrain. Each scene, or when entering the zone, enemies take X dark damage. If the zone has not affected an enemy for 2 scenes, it dissipates.

traits.Name: Battlefield Awareness
traits.Description: When an enemy moves adjacent, you may react to dash 2 tiles. Enemies within 10 tiles suffer stealth penalties equal to your Awareness.

traits.Name: Self Defence
traits.Description: You gain +2 Accuracy against creatures Taunted by you.

traits.Name: Spell Scribe
traits.Description: You may roll [Scholarship] vs [6 + Caster Scholarship] to identify a spell, on a success, you gain +1 Spirit against its caster. Stacking up to 3 times.

traits.Name: Stargazer
traits.Description: Predict the next enemy attack or enemy spell within 6 tiles. You or a chosen ally gain +4 Reflex/Armor against it.

traits.Name: Ethereal Step
traits.Description:
Move up to your [movement] tiles, you ignore terrain penalties, you may pass through 1 obstructed tile in your way. During Movement you may refresh this ability to pass through multiple tiles, however your movement does not refresh.

Obstructions must not be larger than 1 tile, relative to the direction you are moving through them.

traits.Name: Ghost
traits.Description: You cannot be targeted by ANY creature until you make your next attack or the start of your next turn, whichever comes first.

traits.Name: Voidwalker
traits.Description: Teleport up to 4 tiles. Attacks against you have –2 Accuracy until the start of your next turn.

traits.Name: Forgotten History
traits.Description: Gain +X Scholarship while identifying or examining historical objects.

traits.Name: Scroll Of A Madman
traits.Description: Gain +3 Scholarship. You permanently gain the Madness Condition.

traits.Name: Blindfold Training
traits.Description: The blind condition no longer imposes Disadvantage, instead it becomes a -2; Enemy attacks no longer have Advantage against you, instead it becomes a +2.

traits.Name: Ritualist’s Expertise
traits.Description: Ritual spells take half the time and gain +X Arcane on that spell.

traits.Name: Charged Conduit
traits.Description: When casting a spell through a spellcasting craft, add your spell damage bonus to the spell’s damage, healing or Guard gain.

traits.Name: Runic Embument
traits.Description: When you hit with a melee attack, expend 1 Mana to trigger a level 1 spell at the hit's location. You may cast cantrips through ranged attacks.

traits.Name: Focused Mind
traits.Description: You gain +2 Spirit when resisting spell effects. If the spell is from a school you have access to, gain +4 Spirit instead.

traits.Name: Bypassed
traits.Description: You learn 1 cantrip originating from outside your Spellcasting School (If you have no Spellcasting School, you can choose any cantrip).

traits.Name: Spell Specialization
traits.Description: Choose one known spell; it gains +2 damage, range, and healing when applicable. Reduce known spells by 2. You may change out the chosen spells when you level up.

traits.Name: Quick Cast
traits.Description: Cast one spell as a free action instead of an action (Does not bypass attack limit per turn).

traits.Name: Twoification
traits.Description: Allies within 2 tiles gain +2 Movement and +2 range for 2 turns.

traits.Name: Cantrip Knowledge
traits.Description: Convert one level 1 spell from your spellcasting school into a cantrip (cantrips can't be upcast or multicasted).

traits.Name: Minor Chenneling
traits.Description: Cast one level 1 spell without spending mana, you cannot upcast it. Ignoring attack per turn restrictions.

traits.Name: Arcane Detonation
traits.Description: Release all your mana; deal 2 force damage per mana spent to enemies within 2 tiles; you gain 2 Fatigue.

traits.Name: Deliver Destiny
traits.Description: This trait does not gain any uses on a rest. Each time you cast a level 2 Spell or higher you gain 1 use. Make a ranged attack that uses [Arcane] as its accuracy bonus, dealing 1 + your [Arcane] damage to a creature within 6 tiles.

traits.Name: Carpenter
traits.Description: You can convert between wooden components freely. You gain advantage when crafting with wooden components.

traits.Name: Seamstress
traits.Description: You can convert between cloth components freely. During a rest, you can use cloth components to copy a piece of clothing or cloth equipment, the copied item has the same stats but loses any prefixes. You can also create 1 rope component from 2 cloth components.

traits.Name: Jeweler
traits.Description: During a rest, you can restore a found object and increase its perceived market value.

traits.Name: Blacksmith
traits.Description: Repair gear during rest. Restored gear gains +1 Damage or +1 Armor, the Bonus has 3 Durability. You can create standard gear during a rest.

traits.Name: Herbalist
traits.Description: Gain Advantage on checks needed to care for or identify plants. You may try to scavenge surroundings to find herbs, and other ingredients.

traits.Name: Chef
traits.Description: Cook allies a meal during a rest. Eating the meal grants them +X Spirit or +X Fortitude next combat

traits.Name: Alchemedic
traits.Description: You know how to craft all potions with at least 2 Vital ingredients (V,V,?).

traits.Name: Deep Diving Miner
traits.Description: You gain advantage on extracting and identifying minerals. Deal +X damage to constructs and stone enemies. Ignore disadvantages from non-magical darkness. Gain +2 Armor underground or in darkness. Blunt weapons deal +1 Damage.

traits.Name: Sharp Nose
traits.Description: Gain advantage on checks involving smell such as detecting poison, tracking, identifying substances and alike.

traits.Name: Brewer
traits.Description: During a rest, you may attempt to create potions from your known potions list. You know a number of potion recipes equal to your level (rounded up), gain +X to brewing related checks.

traits.Name: Craftsman
traits.Description: You gain the ability to craft non-trivial crafts; You start with simple recipes, for each point of Scholarship above 1, increases the known complexity. You know a number of recipes equal to half your [Tinker].

traits.Name: Reinforced Construction
traits.Description: Crafts and modifications you create gain +2 Durability when applicable.

traits.Name: Gearwright
traits.Description: Repair one trivial or simple craft during a rest without a check (Requires 1 relevant component).

traits.Name: Create Friend
traits.Description:
When unlocking this trait choose one of the following, and one more for every 3 feat points you have in tinker:

Mechanical Assistant
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Metal - Plate], construct a small mechanical assistant. It counts as a companion with the following stat block:
| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 0 | SKILL 1 | MIND 2
| Traits:
- Assist: This companion assist you while crafting, smithing, brewing or casting a ritual. It grants you +2 to the relevant rolls. 

Combat Rover
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Stone - Cut], create a small combat rover, It counts as a companion with the following stat block:
| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 2 | SKILL 1 | MIND 0
| Traits:
- Melee Strike (Costs 1 Durability): Strike a target within Melee range with [2 + Your Tinker] Accuracy; It deals [1+ Your Tinker] Force Damage. 

Spell Drone
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Wooden - Core], create a flying spell drone that stays within 3 tiles of you. It counts as a companion with the following stat block:
| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 0 | SKILL 1 | MIND 2
| Traits:
- Conduit (Costs 1 Durability): You cast a spell from this companions position.

traits.Name: Arc Current
traits.Description: Constructs/Machines you have deployed can expend one unit of Durability (Fuel) to shock targets within 2 tiles, dealing lightning damage equal to half your [tinker] (rounded up). This counts as an attack by the machine.

traits.Name: Battle Artisan
traits.Description: You gain access to combat crafts, which you can craft in the middle of combat; You know a number of combat crafts equal to your [Tinker].

traits.Name: Field Mechanic
traits.Description: Attempt to repair a craft to full operation; Roll [Tinker] vs [Craft Complexity].

traits.Name: Scrap Salvager
traits.Description: Attempt to dismantle a craft; Roll [Tinker] vs [Craft Complexity]. On a success, gain all components needed to craft it. On a fail, gain 1 random relevant component. Attampting this abbility outside of combat does not consume uses.

traits.Name: Jury-Rig
traits.Description: Restore a broken craft to 1 Durability for a Scene. While active, it gains +2 damage or healing when applicable.

traits.Name: Quick sip
traits.Description: Each Scene, you may drink one potion as a free action.

traits.Name: One-of-a-kind
traits.Description: Your attacks gain +2 damage. After activating this trait; you cannot use the same attack more than once per combat. Lasts until your next rest.

traits.Name: Loser's Fallacy
traits.Description: Single-target attacks affected by your traits deal bonus damage equal to the granting trait's point cost. This effect stacks.

traits.Name: Rush
traits.Description: If you haven't acted this turn, swap initiative with a target. The target acts immediately, and you act on their original turn for the rest of combat.

traits.Name: Overexertion
traits.Description: You may activate traits, while you have no uses left. Doing so grants 1 point of fatigue per activation.

traits.Name: Overexertion
traits.Description: You may activate traits, while you have no uses left. Doing so grants 1 point of fatigue per activation.

traits.Name: Phoenix Recovery
traits.Description: Upon reaching 0 Health, recover 6 Health and immediately take another turn.

traits.Name: Return
traits.Description: You may return weapons you threw to your hand at the end of your turn.

traits.Name: Master Thrower
traits.Description: Any throwable item you use deals +X Damage. Improvised thrown weapons now use your highest finesse weapon accuracy bonus.

traits.Name: Feat Forward
traits.Description: You gain 2 Feat points.

traits.Name: Feat Forward
traits.Description: You gain 2 Feat points.

traits.Name: Carrying Mule
traits.Description: You have +5 Maximum Encumbrance.

traits.Name: Sharesies
traits.Description: Throw your ally a weapon, if you are proficient with it, they also become proficient with it, until the end of combat.

traits.Name: Redoubled Valor
traits.Description: While you have no known spells; When you are given a buff by an ally, you may choose to double its duration or effect.

traits.Name: Tactical Awareness
traits.Description: Gain +X Accuracy against enemies adjacent to your allies.

traits.Name: Lead And Follow
traits.Description: When you see an ally perform a trait granted attack action, you may perform the same action against the same target imidietly as a free action, if you also have that trait and are in range of the target.

traits.Name: Splash Zone
traits.Description: When you throw a potion, its effects apply to all targets in adjacent tiles to the tile it landed on.

traits.Name: Deep Pockets
traits.Description: Spend 2 mana to create one crafting component; if unused the component disappears on your next sleep.

traits.Name: Even Deeper Pockets
traits.Description: When summoning a component; You may pay +2 Mana, and instead gain one trivial craft. It will disappear next sleep.

traits.Name: Gift Of Essence
traits.Description: When an ally within 8 tiles casts a spell, you may pay its mana costs with your mana instead.

traits.Name: Precision Form
traits.Description: If your attack accuracy exceeded half (rounded up) of the enemy's armor, that attack gains +X damage.

traits.Name: Swift Hug
traits.Description: When you dash into a target you may attempt to grapple them as a free action.

traits.Name: Swift and Vigilant
traits.Description: If you dash into an ally, they gain Guard equal to your [Level]; otherwise, you gain Guard equal to your level.

traits.Name: Swift and Impactful
traits.Description: The target you dash to becomes Stunned if you have a shield equipped.

traits.Name: Secrets Of The Cosmos
traits.Description: Occult cantrips and Cosmic spells gain +1 Range. Learn 1 Occult cantrip and 1 Cosmic spell, bypassing type restrictions.

traits.Name: Forbidden Insight
traits.Description: Learn one passive effect of a creature within 6 tiles. Your next attack or spell against it deals +2 Damage.

traits.Name: Knowledge Seeker
traits.Description: Each night, you may ask the universe one yes/no question(Narrator's discretion).

traits.Name: Swift and Crippling
traits.Description: If the target you dashed into is an enemy, they gain 3 stacks of Slow until the start of your next turn.

traits.Name: Remote activation
traits.Description: Activate an allied mechanical device, trap, or gadget within 6 tiles as a free action.

traits.Name: Climber
traits.Description: You gain advantage on climbing checks. While not moving and on a wall, you cannot be knocked off it.

traits.Name: Traveler's Endurance
traits.Description: You have +1 Movement and you ignore the first level of Fatigue.

traits.Name: Coward’s Instinct
traits.Description: Gain +2 Movement while moving away from enemies or while you have the feared condition.

traits.Name: Swiftswitch
traits.Description: The target you dash into is swapped with your original position.

traits.Name: Absorb Soul
traits.Description: Defeating an enemy with a spell refunds its mana cost.

traits.Name: Swift and Crushing
traits.Description: The target you dash into takes +1 damage. If they are below half Health, they instead take +2 damage.

traits.Name: Tracer Flare
traits.Description: Fire a glowing projectile using your ranged weapon, it marks the struck target; allies gain +X accuracy against the marked target.

traits.Name: Arc Shot
traits.Description: While targeting creatures behind partial cover, you have +2 accuracy.

traits.Name: Blacksmith
traits.Description: Repair gear during rest. Restored gear gains +1 Damage or +1 Armor, the Bonus has 3 Durability. You can create standard gear during a rest.

traits.Name: Human: Adaptive Soul
traits.Description: You gain an additional Trait Point at character creation.

traits.Name: Dinqui: Hardened Stone
traits.Description: Whenever you reach half health, you gain Guard equal to your Fortitude. This effect refreshes upon reaching full health.

traits.Name: Dinqui: Heavy Flight
traits.Description: Using your gargoyle wings, you can fly—ignoring floor hazards and moving freely up to 8 units above the ground. Your flight distance is limited by your Movement.

traits.Name: Ashten: Aetherblood Surge
traits.Description: When you take damage, release energy: deal 2 Fire Damage to adjacent enemies and gain +1 Armor for 2 turns.

traits.Name: Ashten: Surviving Ash
traits.Description: When healed, gain 1 stack of Mantra. Outside combat, regenerate 1 health per hour.

traits.Name: Khraa: Fourfold Precision
traits.Description: You may wield an additional one-handed weapon or perform two off-hand attacks per turn. Gain +1 Accuracy on all melee attacks made while dual wielding or climbing.

traits.Name: Eladri: Wild: Starlit Anima
traits.Description: Spend 1 Mana to gain +2 Reflex or +2 Accuracy for 2 Scenes.

traits.Name: Eladri: Wild: Mortal Knowledge
traits.Description: Spend X Mana to gain +X on a check.

traits.Name: Eladri: Astral: Starlit Knowledge
traits.Description: Spend 1 Mana to gain +2 Arcana or +2 Accuracy for 2 Scenes.

traits.Name: Eladri: Astral: Astral Knowledge
traits.Description: When receiving an Accuracy bonus, you can instead gain Mana equal to half that amount, rounded up.

traits.Name: Rokana: Pelagic: Aquatic Combatant
traits.Description: While swimming you have +3 Speed. You may activate this bonus on land, where it lasts for 2 Scenes.

traits.Name: Rokana: Chthonic: Durable Chitin
traits.Description: When you take damage, you may reduce it by your level. If you do, reduce your Speed by X until your next turn.
